description: JoeKnowsBall MLB Numerology Methodology. Players are selected and ranked only by deterministic numerology resonance. Baseball opportunity is displayed as context only and never affects alignment, qualification, or rank.

signalCapabilities.gameStartTimeNumber: disabled — requires confirmed game-time data per batter, not yet in candidate payload
signalCapabilities.teamCityBallpark: disabled — deterministic name-number formulas for team/city/ballpark defined but MLB team names not yet in scoring pipeline
signalCapabilities.opposingPitcherProfile: disabled — pitcher numerology fields collected but cross-signal scoring vs batter not yet implemented
signalCapabilities.statisticalMilestone: disabled — milestone detection requires rolling game-log lookup not in current pipeline

doubleCounting.rule: Once a source field awards points at any tier, it does not award additional points at a lower tier.
doubleCounting.convergenceCap: Convergence bonus capped at convergenceMaxBonus. Requires 3+ independent source fields.
examples: Jersey 22 on a 22/4 day: exact master only, not root points additionally.
Batting 4th on a root-4 day: exact root only, not family points additionally.
Jersey 33 on Calendar Day 24/6: shared root-6, not exact compound match to 24.

finalScoreFormula: Alignment Score = Numerology Resonance only. Baseball Opportunity is displayed as context only and does not affect selection, qualification, or rank.
grokProhibitedActions: Change any calculated number or score
Change opponent, lineup status, odds, or lines
